column1: # Column: Priority | Type: Integer | Description: Indicates sample selection priority
# 0 = Excluded: Samples with no assigned priority
# 1 = Primary focus: Skin samples as the main analysis target
# 2 = Secondary focus: Samples prioritized due to Sample_location or Sample_skin_type characteristics
# 3 = Supplementary: Samples from different libraries with sufficient sample size
# 4 = Lowest priority: Samples from different libraries with limited sample size
